name: Lotte World
description: Lotte World or Lotte World Adventure is a theme park and major recreation complex in Seoul, South Korea.  Opened in July 1989, Lotte World consists of a large indoor theme park, an outdoor amusement park called "Magic Island", shopping malls, a luxury hotel, an observation tower, a Korean folk museum, sports facilities and movie theaters.  Lotte World's sister theme park, Lotte World Adventure Busan, opened in March 2022.
imageAttribution: Lotte World and Lotte World Tower
